mechanism: QT returns duration to private portfolios, adding to the net duration supply from fiscal issuance. The combined supply (~$2.0-2.6T/year) vastly exceeds the pre-pandemic norm and must be absorbed by price-sensitive buyers at higher term premia.
regime_dependence: Amplified when fiscal deficits are large and the marginal buyer is price-sensitive. Attenuated if fiscal consolidation reduces issuance or if price-insensitive foreign demand returns.
